title: Substitutions
description: A suggested swap for a pantry ingredient — because it's out of stock, expiring, expensive, or clashes with the diet. Written by the sourcing optimizer.

substituteName.description: the ingredient name to use instead

ratio.description: how much substitute per one unit of the original (1 = one-for-one)

note.description: a short human note, e.g. 'butter → olive oil works for sautéing'
